report_name: Phishing Campaign Impersonates SendGrid Support, Leverages Compromised Account for High Authenticity

threat_actors.name: SendGrid Support Impersonation Actor
threat_actors.description: An unnamed actor conducting a phishing campaign by impersonating SendGrid support notifications. The actor uses a compromised SendGrid account to send emails and lure victims to a credential harvesting page.
threat_actors.goals: Harvest SendGrid user credentials for account takeover.

attack_patterns.name: Spearphishing Link
attack_patterns.description: The core of the attack is delivering a malicious link via email to a credential harvesting site.

attack_patterns.name: Spearphishing Service
attack_patterns.description: The campaign's goal was to trick users into revealing their credentials on a fake login page by sending emails from a compromised email delivery service account.

attack_patterns.name: Valid Accounts
attack_patterns.description: Used a compromised SendGrid account to send phishing emails with high authenticity and aimed to harvest more valid account credentials from victims.

identities.name: SendGrid
identities.description: The email delivery service impersonated by attackers. A compromised SendGrid account was used to distribute the phishing emails, abusing the service's trusted infrastructure.

infrastructure.name: SendGrid Credential Harvesting Site
infrastructure.description: A phishing website hosted at personalsglogin.com, designed to replicate the real SendGrid login portal to steal user credentials.

infrastructure.name: Compromised SendGrid Account
infrastructure.description: A legitimate but compromised SendGrid account was used to distribute the phishing emails, allowing them to bypass security filters and appear authentic.

indicators.name: SendGrid Phishing Domain personalsglogin.com
indicators.x_netsecio_sigma_rule:
title: SendGrid Phishing Domain DNS Query
id: 2b8a1c3d-f4e5-4b9a-8c7d-6e5f4d3c2b1a
status: experimental
description: Detects DNS queries to a known phishing domain impersonating SendGrid.
references:
  - https://www.mailguard.com.au/blog/sendgrid-support-email-phish-now-circulating?hs_amp=true
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-04
tags:
  - attack.t1566.002
  - attack.initial_access
level: high
logsource:
  category: dns_query
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    QueryName|contains:
      - 'personalsglogin.com'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects network traffic to the credential harvesting domain personalsglogin.com.

indicators.name: SendGrid Phishing Lure Subject
indicators.pattern:
title: SendGrid Phishing Lure Subject Line
id: 9e8f7d6c-5b4a-4c3d-2b1a-0f9e8d7c6b5a
status: experimental
description: Detects emails with subject lines used in a SendGrid impersonation phishing campaign.
references:
  - https://www.mailguard.com.au/blog/sendgrid-support-email-phish-now-circulating?hs_amp=true
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-04
tags:
  - attack.t1598.001
  - attack.reconnaissance
level: medium
logsource:
  category: email
detection:
  selection:
    Subject|contains:
      - 'Insufficient Account Permissions'
      - 'Message Rejection Notification'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects emails with subject lines such as 'Insufficient Account Permissions' or 'Message Rejection Notification' used as lures in this campaign.
